svg.text: Cache path: consumes PrefetchState (no hash lookup) │ DEFAULT path: _generic_forward_path (hash lookup + admission)
✔ Cache path: No hash lookup / sync in forward
PrefetchState (produced by prefetch() on separate CUDA stream)
Stored in self._prefetch_states (Deque). Fields: slot_indices, unique_keys, reverse_indices,
[if use_index_dedup] segmented_unique_cuda: remove duplicate key lookups
Retrieves PrefetchState from deque. If empty: auto-calls prefetch() [line 921-922]
autograd Function: forward() reads embeddings, backward() will update them
slot_indices from PrefetchState → direct indexed read (no hash lookup!)
load_from_flat_table_emb kernel reads embedding by flat-table offset. State from cache._state or storage._state.
Returns unique_values [N × val_dim] with full VALUE columns (emb + optimizer states)
Applies admit_strategy filter; admitted keys get initializer() for embedding init [line 849]
Persist newly admitted keys with initialized embeddings + zero optimizer states
Applies pooling (SUM/MEAN) + per_sample_weights via D_offsets for mixed dims.
ctx stores for backward: slot_indices, unique_keys,
Cache/HBM_DIRECT vs DEFAULT: Why forward differs
Cache/HBM_DIRECT: prefetch() already resolved hash → slot_indices. Forward just does load_from_flat (indexed read) — no hash, no I/O.
DEFAULT: No prefetch cache. Forward calls _generic_forward_path: storage.find (hash lookup) → admission → init → insert for new keys.
Shared: Both paths end with gather_embedding_pooled to scatter unique_embs into batched output_embs.
Key PrefetchState fields (Cache path): slot_indices, reverse_indices, non_admitted_positions, update_slot_indices.
